publishedAbstract: The `OpenShift Liveness Probe` restarts MDS pod as it transitions from `Journal Replay Complete` to `Active`. When the Ceph MDS has completed a Journal Replay, there is a many, many minute period of time where it's transitioning to the `Active` state. During this time the MDS does not have a status of `Replay` nor does it have a status of `Active`. The `OpenShift Liveness Probe` determines this to be a problem and erroneously restarts the MDS pod.
publishedTitle: ODF/OCS: Liveness Probe restarts MDS pod as it transitions from Journal Replay Complete to Active.
